content_to_dict.description: Dictionary mapping canonical compound IDs to rich assay extraction objects. Runtime normalizes these objects back to raw assay value strings for downstream compatibility.

content_to_multi_assay_dict.description: Nested dictionary mapping requested assay names to canonical compound-ID/rich extraction-object dictionaries. Runtime normalizes these objects back to raw assay value strings for downstream compatibility.

identify_assay_visual_review_requests.description: Dictionary mapping assay names to visual-review request arrays. Each request should include compound_id, ocr_value, confidence, reason, and optional context.

reconcile_assay_values_with_visual_repor.description: Nested dictionary mapping assay names to final compound-ID/value strings after high-confidence visual corrections.

get_compound_id_from_description.description: JSON object containing the final normalized compound ID or the string None, plus confidence/reason self-check fields when produced by the current prompt.

resolve_compound_id_alias.description: JSON object containing the allowlist-resolved canonical compound ID or the string None, plus confidence/reason self-check fields when produced by the current prompt.
